[TITLE]: Full dress rehearsal for Victory Day parade in Russia[1]| Europe
[METADATA/INTRO]: | Russian Police academy female cadets march during a rehearsal for the Victory Day military parade at Dvortsovaya (Palace) Square in St Petersburg, Russia, May 7, 2014. Victory Day, marking the defeat of Nazi Germany, is Russia's most important secular...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Russian Police academy female cadets march during a rehearsal for the Victory Day military parade at Dvortsovaya (Palace) Square in St Petersburg, Russia, May 7, 2014. Victory Day, marking the defeat of Nazi Germany, is Russia's most important secular holiday celebrated on May 9. [Photo/icpress.cn]

[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2011-05-09
[TITLE]: Russian police cadets on Victory Day parade past Kremlin - Mirror Online
[METADATA/INTRO]: WOMEN police cadets march through St Petersburg as part of yesterday’s Victory Day parades. More than 20,000 military and veterans in Russia helped mark the end of the Second World War....
